what: Exact held-out re-score of the 12 restore-affected cells (see backfill_history.md). Re-ran the held-out finetune-and-eval ONLY (no base training) on each cell's native training checkpoint via resume_heldout_beaker.py, writing correct ignore-class metrics into the native W&B run at its own step. Reproduces the native LR-engaged value exactly.
wrapper_commit_chain: c757463 feat(heldout): Beaker port of resume_heldout for exact held-out re-scoring
82e6539 fix(heldout): fetch run config via GraphQL, not wandb.Api().run()
0a9141b fix(heldout): normalize index.json params_path so best_eval selects correctly
validation: j2uh7x44 re-score LR-engaged = 0.7198663 vs HPC-proto target 0.7198668 (|delta|=4.65e-07); ignore F1/PR-AUC/recall/precision all match the proto.
